note: Navigation Extra Tools has no config form; its surface is a set of Navigation-menu links (cache/cron/updates), two gating permissions, and a hard dependency on core navigation. All cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I use the new core Navigation module and want the cache-clear / run-cron / run-updates shortcuts that Admin Toolbar Extra Tools gave the old Toolbar. Which contrib module provides that for the Navigation module?
evals.expected_output: Navigation Extra Tools — it adds a Tools submenu to the core Navigation toolbar with flush-cache/run-cron/run-updates links, the Navigation-era analog of admin_toolbar_tools.

evals.prompt: Which core module must be enabled for Navigation Extra Tools to work?
evals.expected_output: It depends on core's Navigation module (drupal:navigation); that must be enabled.

evals.prompt: What links does Navigation Extra Tools add to the Navigation menu?
evals.expected_output: A Tools submenu with: Flush all caches, a 'Flush individual cache' group (CSS/JS, plugins, static, routing & links, Twig, render, theme registry rebuild, Views), Run cron, and Run updates (core system.db_update).

evals.prompt: What is the path and route name for the 'Flush all caches' link added by Navigation Extra Tools, and what does it call?
evals.expected_output: Path /admin/flush, route navigation_extra_tools.flush, handled by NavigationExtraToolsController::flushAll() which calls drupal_flush_all_caches().

evals.prompt: How does Navigation Extra Tools let an administrator run cron from the toolbar — what path/route and which permission gates it?
evals.expected_output: The Run cron link at /run-cron (route navigation_extra_tools.run.cron) runs cron; it requires the 'access navigation extra tools cron' permission.

evals.prompt: Which two permissions must I grant so a role can see and use Navigation Extra Tools' cache-flush links and its run-cron link?
must_contain_any: access navigation extra tools cache flushing
evals.expected_output: 'access navigation extra tools cache flushing' gates all cache-flush links; 'access navigation extra tools cron' gates the run-cron link.

evals.prompt: If the Devel module is installed alongside Navigation Extra Tools, what extra menu appears and where is it configured?
evals.expected_output: A Development submenu is added under Tools; its items mirror the Devel Toolbar settings at /admin/config/development/devel/toolbar (config devel.toolbar.settings).

evals.prompt: Does Navigation Extra Tools have its own configuration/settings form?
evals.expected_output: No — the module provides no configuration form of its own (configure is null); its only configurable behavior is the optional Devel submenu, controlled by Devel's own toolbar settings.
